positive: Minimalist, stylized vector illustration of a majestic forest spirit creature, blending elements of deer, raven, and ancient growth. The spirit should be depicted in a dynamic, soaring pose, with flowing leaves and crystalline feathers trailing from its form. The background should be a simple, negative space, allowing the figure to pop against the fabric. Use a restricted color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and antique gold against a crisp white background. Style should be inspired by modern tattoo flash art and negative space design, ensuring clean outlines and strong silhouette appeal. High contrast, perfect symmetry, vector quality, suitable for apparel print.
